# rldyour Cross-Tool Contract Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_contract_matrix.py from config/rldyour-contract.json. Do not edit by hand. -->

This matrix is the human-readable projection of the machine-readable rldyour contract. It documents how the same business mechanism maps to Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. The local validator proves the Claude Code adapter against files in this repository and requires non-local adapters to be explicitly mapped or marked adapter-specific.

- Schema version: `1`
- Verified on: `2026-05-21`
- Owner repository: `NDDev-it-com/rldyour-claudecode`

## Domains

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| browser | Browser validation, debugging, routing | rldyour-browser | rldyour-browser | rldyour-browser |
| design | Figma-to-code, UI systems, frontend architecture | rldyour-design | rldyour-design | rldyour-design |
| explore | Technical and web research | rldyour-explore | rldyour-explore | rldyour-explore |
| flow | SDLC lifecycle orchestration | rldyour-flow | rldyour-flow | rldyour-flow |
| lsps | Language-server routing, setup, health checks | rldyour-lsps | rldyour-lsps | rldyour-lsps |
| mcps | Single-owner MCP transport layer | rldyour-mcps | rldyour-mcps | rldyour-mcps |
| rules | Quality, architecture, dependency, verification rules | rldyour-rules | rldyour-rules | rldyour-rules |
| security | Defensive security guidance and review | rldyour-security | rldyour-security | rldyour-security |
| serena-mcp | Serena semantic code workflow and memory sync | rldyour-serena-mcp | rldyour-serena-mcp | rldyour-serena-mcp |

## Public Flows

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| design.ry-design | End-to-end design and UI implementation workflow | /rldyour-design:ry-design | $rldyour-design:ry-design | /ry-design | `plugins/rldyour-design/commands/ry-design.md` |
| explore.ry-explore | Isolated deep research dispatch to the research agent | /rldyour-explore:ry-explore | $rldyour-explore:tech-research | /ry-explore | `plugins/rldyour-explore/commands/ry-explore.md` |
| flow.init | Read-only project context initialization | /rldyour-flow:ry-init | $rldyour-flow:ry-init | /ry-init | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-init.md` |
| flow.start | Full implementation lifecycle | /rldyour-flow:ry-start | $rldyour-flow:ry-start | /ry-start | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-start.md` |
| flow.new-project | New-project planning and optional scaffold workflow | /rldyour-flow:ry-newp | $rldyour-flow:ry-newp | /ry-newp | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-newp.md` |
| flow.review | Report-only deep review workflow | /rldyour-flow:ry-review | $rldyour-flow:ry-review | /ry-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-review.md` |
| flow.repair | Repository repair and semantic entropy normalization workflow | /rldyour-flow:ry-repair | $rldyour-flow:ry-repair | /ry-repair | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-repair.md` |
| flow.deploy | Deploy workflow with local, GitHub, server, logs, and sync closure | /rldyour-flow:ry-deploy | $rldyour-flow:ry-deploy | /ry-deploy | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-deploy.md` |
| flow.sync.manual | Explicit post-task synchronization wrapper | /rldyour-flow:ry-sync | $rldyour-flow:flow-post-task-sync | /ry-sync | `plugins/rldyour-flow/commands/ry-sync.md` |
| rules.review | Rules and quality discipline review | /rldyour-rules:ry-rules-review | $rldyour-rules:ry-rules-review | /ry-rules-review | `plugins/rldyour-rules/commands/ry-rules-review.md` |
| security.review | Defensive security review | /rldyour-security:ry-sec-review | $rldyour-security:ry-sec-review | /ry-sec-review | `plugins/rldyour-security/commands/ry-sec-review.md` |

## Agent Roles

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| agent.explore.research | Isolated research explorer | ry-explore | research-explorer | ry-explore | `plugins/rldyour-explore/agents/ry-explore.md` |
| agent.review.architecture | Architecture reviewer | flow-architecture-review | architecture-reviewer | flow-architecture-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-architecture-review.md` |
| agent.review.consistency | Consistency reviewer | flow-consistency-review | consistency-reviewer | flow-consistency-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-consistency-review.md` |
| agent.review.integration | Integration reviewer | flow-integration-review | covered by architecture-reviewer and quality-reviewer in Codex | flow-integration-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-integration-review.md` |
| agent.review.quality | Quality reviewer | flow-quality-review | quality-reviewer | flow-quality-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-quality-review.md` |
| agent.review.security | Security reviewer | flow-security-review | security-audit | flow-security-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-security-review.md` |
| agent.review.verification | Verification and test reviewer | flow-verification-review | test-reviewer | flow-verification-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-verification-review.md` |
| agent.sync.serena-memory | Serena memory synchronization agent | flow-memory-sync | serena-sync | flow-memory-sync | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/agents/flow-memory-sync.md` |

## Hook Lifecycle

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| session.start.worktree-bootstrap | Restore agent-only fullrepo context into new worktrees | rldyour-flow | session_start_worktree_bootstrap | shell.env or startup plugin event | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/session_start_worktree_bootstrap.sh` |
| session.start.context | Load lightweight session context | rldyour-flow | session_start_context | shell.env or startup plugin event | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/session_start_context.sh` |
| prompt.submit.sync-context | Inject Serena workflow context before prompt processing | rldyour-serena-mcp | user_prompt_submit | prompt submit plugin event | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/user_prompt_submit.sh` |
| tool.pre.git-auto-sync-baseline | Record Serena baseline before git history-changing commands | rldyour-serena-mcp | prepare_auto_sync | tool.execute.before | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/prepare_auto_sync.sh` |
| tool.pre.ci-advisory | Advisory guard for manual-first GitHub Actions usage | rldyour-flow | pre_tool_use_ci_advisory | tool.execute.before | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/pre_tool_use_ci_advisory.sh` |
| tool.post.serena-sync-required | Mark Serena sync as required after git history-changing commands | rldyour-serena-mcp | mark_sync_required | tool.execute.after | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/mark_sync_required.sh` |
| tool.post.commit-advice | Surface post-commit follow-up guidance | rldyour-flow | post_tool_use_commit_advice | tool.execute.after | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/post_tool_use_commit_advice.sh` |
| task.stop.memory-sync | Block final response when Serena memory sync is required via ordered flow dispatcher | rldyour-flow | stop_memory_sync | task stop plugin event | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/stop_lifecycle_dispatcher.sh` |
| task.stop.post-task-sync | Block final response when post-task sync is required | rldyour-flow | stop_post_task_sync | task stop plugin event | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/stop_lifecycle_dispatcher.sh` |

## CI Baseline

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| validate-static | JSON schema, Python syntax, shell syntax, frontmatter, text hygiene | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must provide equivalent static validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent static validation |
| validate-inventory | Generated inventory freshness | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation |
| validate-contract | Cross-tool business contract and generated matrix freshness | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must validate the same contract ID set | adapter repository must validate the same contract ID set |
| validate-hooks-fixtures | Hook lifecycle smoke fixtures | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must smoke hook fixtures | adapter repository must smoke hook/plugin-event fixtures |
| pytest-unit | Unit tests for validators and scripts | `.github/workflows/pytest.yml` | adapter repository must run its unit test suite | adapter repository must run its unit test suite |
| native-cli-runtime-smoke | Native Claude plugin validator and runtime smoke | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must run native CLI/runtime smoke when available | adapter repository must run native CLI/runtime smoke when available |
| codeql-upload | CodeQL SARIF upload for public repo security analysis | `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` | adapter repository should run CodeQL or documented equivalent | adapter repository should run CodeQL or documented equivalent |
| dependency-review | Pull-request dependency diff review | `.github/workflows/dependency-review.yml` | adapter repository should run dependency review or documented equivalent | adapter repository should run dependency review or documented equivalent |
| secret-scan | Secret scan and security pattern scan | `.github/workflows/gitleaks.yml` | adapter repository must run secret scanning | adapter repository must run secret scanning |
| actionlint | GitHub workflow lint | `.github/workflows/actionlint.yml` | adapter repository must lint workflows | adapter repository must lint workflows |
| release-state | Version, changelog, manifests, tags, release manifest | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must validate release state | adapter repository must validate release state |
| sbom | Release evidence bundle and SBOM-equivalent manifest | `.github/workflows/release.yml` | adapter repository should publish release evidence | adapter repository should publish release evidence |
